message:
feat(cli): wire up full capabilities detection in agent capabilities command (c9r)

Replace stub implementation with actual system capability detection:
- Detect 14 tools with version information (ps, lsof, ss, perf, strace, etc.)
- Report system permissions (sudo, root, ptrace, uid, capabilities)
- Detect data sources (procfs, sysfs, cgroups, ebpf, schedstat)
- Detect supervisors (systemd, docker, podman, supervisord, launchd)
- Compute feature availability (deep_scan, maximal_scan)
- Report OS info (kernel, arch, container detection)
- Compute available actions based on permissions and tools

Also refactored progress_emitter into reusable helper function.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
